tasks.title: security review + CSP + safe paste + dependency audit
tasks.verification: operator INDEPENDENTLY verified: grep over src/+index.html finds NO eval / new Function / dangerouslySetInnerHTML / remote <script src=https> / analytics. CSP meta enforced: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; worker-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; form-action 'none'; base-uri 'none'. `npm audit` = 0 vulnerabilities (prod AND dev). npm test 49 passed; typecheck clean; build ok; and `npx playwright test` -> 18 passed across chromium/firefox/webkit UNDER the CSP (proving the policy does not break the app or the service worker).
